label.name: fish-curve
label.svg: <line x1="67.7928695678711" y1="50.47821044921875" x2="76.28182983398438" y2="52.34578323364258" data-type="edge" data-node-from="5" data-node-to="6"></line> <line x1="58.45500564575195" y1="49.9688720703125" x2="67.7928695678711" y2="50.47821044921875" data-type="edge" data-node-from="4" data-node-to="5"></line> <line x1="49.456703186035156" y1="50.64799118041992" x2="58.45500564575195" y2="49.9688720703125" data-type="edge" data-node-from="1" data-node-to="4"></line> <circle r="0.75" cx="49.456703186035156" cy="50.64799118041992" data-type="element node" data-element-id="1" data-node-id="1" data-label-name="Head"></circle> <circle r="0.75" cx="58.45500564575195" cy="49.9688720703125" data-type="element node" data-element-id="4" data-node-id="4" data-label-name="Mid1"></circle> <circle r="0.75" cx="67.7928695678711" cy="50.47821044921875" data-type="element node" data-element-id="5" data-node-id="5" data-label-name="Mid2"></circle> <circle r="0.75" cx="76.28182983398438" cy="52.34578323364258" data-type="element node" data-element-id="6" data-node-id="6" data-label-name="Tail"></circle>
